feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Guidance on Generating SSL Certificate and CSR for SAP Business One Web Client Configuration
entry.content: Does SAP provide a tool or guidelines for generating an SSL certificate and CSR to configure the SAP Business One Web Client? The customer requires SSL (https://) for their B1 Web Client, using a domain like https://www.domainName.com . If available, could you please share guidance on this process?

entry.title: "invalid report file path" error shown & it is resolved after restart SAP
entry.content:
User is facing "invalid report file path" error message & it is resolved once restart SAP

User is facing repeatedly same problem

What should i do ?

entry.title: Query in Sap b1 Hana with parameters
entry.content:
Hi
In a query in sap B1 HANA i want to create DateFrom,DateTo and Vendor/Customer Parameters. I am creating Sales Invoice Report.
 
Thanks

entry.title: SAP Business One licensing schema
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have a question about SAP Business One version for HANA in virtualization environment, If I intends to utilize VMware SRM for Disaster Recovery Center (DRC) scenario, will there be any impact on their hardware key if I activate the secondary server? Will it change or the secondary server will using the same hardware key? In my experience, in SQL version the hardware key still the same, but how about in HANA version?

Thank you,

SAP Business One, version for SAP HANA

entry.title: Users who printed
entry.content:
Hi All

Is it possible to trace SAP Users who printed a certain document if it has been printed more than once by different SAP Users?

 

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: How to Control Module Access in SAP Business One Web Client?
entry.content:
Hello SAP experts! 

In SAP Business One, clients with a professional license have full access to all modules. However, we are looking for a way to configure the system so that only specific modules are accessible based on the client’s actual needs, while restricting companywide access to modules they do not require when using the Web Client. 

Is there a way to achieve this level of control through configuration or third-party tools? Can module access be controlled in a way that allows clients to still manage their environment autonomously, while ensuring that these access restrictions cannot be overridden - even if they have a superuser?

I’m really looking forward to hearing your suggestions.

Thank you!

entry.title: Production order without material issue
entry.content:
Greetings of the day.

Is it possible to create production order without the issue of material.  We would like to use this feature for the manufacture of Dies/Moulds which go for resinking/remachining of the damaged tools.  This process is done atleast 30 times in its lifecycle.  Or would someone suggest any other option?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: What is the maximum limit (rows) allowed in SAP to post marketing documents or via DTW?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Based on your experience, what is the maximum rows that SAP B1 allows to post via UI or via DTW without compromising the performance of the server? If there is, please share any recommendations.

 

Thank you.

Rogelio

entry.title: Stored Procedure Notification
entry.content:
Hi

  I want Stored Procedure Notification in HANA if A/p Invoice is copied to Credit Note then Unit Price of line items should be same.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Emails not going
entry.content:
Hi

  When a user is trying to send Email it is not going. When Email is sent through manager ID then only email goes.

I am using Hana

Thanks

entry.title: SAP-Business-One WebClientApiExtensions Problems
entry.content:
Hi,

i am testing the SAP-Business-One Web-Client. My SBO-Version is: 
SBO-Version SAP-Business One 10.0 SP 2411

I have reproduced the Example Adding a Click-Button...

But here i am running into little trouble.

E.g. the Context-Function Preview (Web Client) does not work, also the context Menu for mta.yaml is not correct.

I have tested with node -Version: v14.16.1 and also with the last stable node-Version.

any help would be appeciated.

kind Regards,
Matthias Lakämper

https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/developing-extensions-for-sap-business-one-and-the-web-client/customizing-sap-business-one-web-client-views-using-ui-api-extension

entry.title: SAP B1 TB report BP display filtered by GL Accounts
entry.content:
Hello experts!

My client has specific need. They are using Trial Balance Report from financial module.

As you know, this report displays business partners, their Opening Balance, Debit, Credit and Ending balance. This format of this report is acceptable, only thing they want to change is that they want to filter business partner balances by their control accounts. For example, if business partner has entries on two control accounts, they want to choose which control account to display in Trial Balance. As i know this is not possible in Trial Balance.

Do you have any suggestions which report should we use to cover this issue?
1. Report must include Opening Balance, Debit, Credit, Ending Balance

2. Repost must be filtered with control accounts

I would be very grateful, if you will give me some suggestion which report will cover these two topics.

entry.title: How to add vairables to give results from last month, two month ago etc.
entry.content:
Hi All,

I need to be able to amend this query that gives results for all purchase orders from one month ago, two month ago, three months ago etc. Currently it retuns only last month.
Is it possible to have a user input where you enter how many months ago you want to view?
I.E. enter 1 for 1 month ago, 2 for 2 months ago...

SELECT 
OPCH.DocNum, OPCH.DocDate, OPCH.CardCode, OPCH.CardName, OPCH.DocTotal, OPCH.VatSum, (OPCH.DocTotal-  OPCH.VatSum) as 'Nett' 

FROM OPCH OPCH 

WHERE 
OPCH.U_CDL ='y' 
and 
OPCH.DocDate >= DATEADD(MONTH, DATEDIFF(MONTH, 0, GETDATE())-1, 0) 
and 
OPCH.DocDate <= DATEADD(MONTH, DATEDIFF(MONTH, -1, GETDATE())-1, -1)
 
order by OPCH.DocNum asc

I've tried;

OPCH.DocDate >= DATEADD(MONTH, DATEDIFF(MONTH, 0, GETDATE())[%0], 0) and 
OPCH.DocDate <= DATEADD(MONTH, DATEDIFF(MONTH, [%0], GETDATE())[%0], [%0])

But the input changes to a date automatically and obviuously fails.

Thanks.

entry.title: Consulta SQL AR e AP
entry.content: Olá preciso de uma consulta SQL SapB1 AR e AP. Posição dos títulos em aberto (PN, NF, Parcela)

entry.title: Inventory Revaluation with Inventory debit/credit type option
entry.content: My customer is using SAP B1  10.0 (FP2208) for HANA.  When we make Inventory Revaluation with 'Inventory debit/credit' option to change an manufactured item 's inventory value, it makes journal entry on the related account,  but it does not change the value in the Inventory audit report.   The price change option in revaluation can make journal entry and change the value  in the inventory audit report.  but the inventory debit/credit option does not.    Is this normal way of revaluation option function ?  or technical bug ?

entry.title: SAP B1 HANA - Catalina.out full of WARN/ERROR msgs
entry.content:
Hello all, we just discovered that the "catalina.out" log file handled by tomcat on the SAP HANA Server for SAP Business One have been growing slowly over a few months. Last week we discovered the log file was about 900GB. 

After cleaning this file and waiting for it to fill again with some data, we discovered that almost every second these errors are written in the file:

 

2024-12-02 07:47:47 ERROR [https-jsse-nio-40000-exec-52] com.sap.b1.sdk.oidc.core.handler.OAuth2Handler - not a valid token
io.jsonwebtoken.ExpiredJwtException: JWT expired at 2024-11-20T14:05:15Z. Current time: 2024-12-02T06:47:47Z, a difference of 1010552043 milliseconds.  Allowed clock skew: 0 milliseconds.
	at io.jsonwebtoken.impl.DefaultJwtParser.parse(DefaultJwtParser.java:427)
	at io.jsonwebtoken.impl.ImmutableJwtParser.parse(ImmutableJwtParser.java:148)
	at com.sap.b1.sdk.oidc.core.handler.OAuth2Handler.validateAccessToken(OAuth2Handler.java:174)
	at com.sap.b1.sdk.oidc.core.handler.OAuth2Handler.validateAccessToken(OAuth2Handler.java:218)
	at com.sap.b1.sdk.oidc.web.filter.OAuth2TokenFilter.parseAndValidate(OAuth2TokenFilter.java:183)
	at com.sap.b1.sdk.oidc.web.filter.OAuth2TokenFilter.handleAuthorizationHeader(OAuth2TokenFilter.java:125)
	at com.sap.b1.sdk.oidc.web.filter.OAuth2TokenFilter.doFilter(OAuth2TokenFilter.java:67)
	at org.apache.catalina.core.ApplicationFilterChain.internalDoFilter(ApplicationFilterChain.java:181)
	at org.apache.catalina.core.ApplicationFilterChain.doFilter(ApplicationFilterChain.java:156)
	at org.apache.catalina.core.StandardWrapperValve.invoke(StandardWrapperValve.java:168)
	at org.apache.catalina.core.StandardContextValve.invoke(StandardContextValve.java:90)
	at org.apache.catalina.authenticator.AuthenticatorBase.invoke(AuthenticatorBase.java:598)
	at org.apache.catalina.core.StandardHostValve.invoke(StandardHostValve.java:130)
	at org.apache.catalina.valves.ErrorReportValve.invoke(ErrorReportValve.java:93)
	at org.apache.catalina.core.StandardEngineValve.invoke(StandardEngineValve.java:74)
	at org.apache.catalina.connector.CoyoteAdapter.service(CoyoteAdapter.java:342)
	at org.apache.coyote.http11.Http11Processor.service(Http11Processor.java:617)
	at org.apache.coyote.AbstractProcessorLight.process(AbstractProcessorLight.java:63)
	at org.apache.coyote.AbstractProtocol$ConnectionHandler.process(AbstractProtocol.java:934)
	at org.apache.tomcat.util.net.NioEndpoint$SocketProcessor.doRun(NioEndpoint.java:1698)
	at org.apache.tomcat.util.net.SocketProcessorBase.run(SocketProcessorBase.java:52)
	at org.apache.tomcat.util.threads.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1191)
	at org.apache.tomcat.util.threads.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:659)
	at org.apache.tomcat.util.threads.TaskThread$WrappingRunnable.run(TaskThread.java:61)
	at java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:838)
2024-12-02 07:48:01 WARN [https-jsse-nio-40000-exec-71] com.sap.b1.sdk.oidc.web.filter.OAuth2TokenFilter - check authorization header error
com.sap.b1.sdk.oidc.core.exception.B1SDKNotAuthenticatedException: invalid access token
	at com.sap.b1.sdk.oidc.web.filter.OAuth2TokenFilter.parseAndValidate(OAuth2TokenFilter.java:185)
	at com.sap.b1.sdk.oidc.web.filter.OAuth2TokenFilter.handleAuthorizationHeader(OAuth2TokenFilter.java:125)
	at com.sap.b1.sdk.oidc.web.filter.OAuth2TokenFilter.doFilter(OAuth2TokenFilter.java:67)
	at org.apache.catalina.core.ApplicationFilterChain.internalDoFilter(ApplicationFilterChain.java:181)
	at org.apache.catalina.core.ApplicationFilterChain.doFilter(ApplicationFilterChain.java:156)
	at org.apache.catalina.core.StandardWrapperValve.invoke(StandardWrapperValve.java:168)
	at org.apache.catalina.core.StandardContextValve.invoke(StandardContextValve.java:90)
	at org.apache.catalina.authenticator.AuthenticatorBase.invoke(AuthenticatorBase.java:598)
	at org.apache.catalina.core.StandardHostValve.invoke(StandardHostValve.java:130)
	at org.apache.catalina.valves.ErrorReportValve.invoke(ErrorReportValve.java:93)
	at org.apache.catalina.core.StandardEngineValve.invoke(StandardEngineValve.java:74)
	at org.apache.catalina.connector.CoyoteAdapter.service(CoyoteAdapter.java:342)
	at org.apache.coyote.http11.Http11Processor.service(Http11Processor.java:617)
	at org.apache.coyote.AbstractProcessorLight.process(AbstractProcessorLight.java:63)
	at org.apache.coyote.AbstractProtocol$ConnectionHandler.process(AbstractProtocol.java:934)
	at org.apache.tomcat.util.net.NioEndpoint$SocketProcessor.doRun(NioEndpoint.java:1698)
	at org.apache.tomcat.util.net.SocketProcessorBase.run(SocketProcessorBase.java:52)
	at org.apache.tomcat.util.threads.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1191)
	at org.apache.tomcat.util.threads.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:659)
	at org.apache.tomcat.util.threads.TaskThread$WrappingRunnable.run(TaskThread.java:61)
	at java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:838)

 

I was not able to find any documentation or SAP note about this subject. Given the fact that it is writting these ERROR/WARN every seconds, I would like to know if this is normal or not and if it's not normal, how to correct this issue? 

File location is here: /hana/usr/sap/SAPBusinessOne/Common/tomcat/logs

Since we discovered this, at the moment we "clean" this file using the following cmd every day with cron: 

cat /dev/null > /hana/usr/sap/SAPBusinessOne/Common/tomcat/logs/catalina.out

Thank you.

Best regards

entry.title: Denmark Localisation for SAP Business One
entry.content:
Hi All,

I hope you are well.

I would appreciate some clarification on the status of the Denmark Localisation for SAP Business One.

In the link attached below, you can find a list of registered bookkeeping systems that have been checked and registered by the Danish Business Authority. 

Directory of registered bookkeeping systems | The Business Guide

Apparently SAP Business One does not meets the new rules for digital bookkeeping.

Does anyone know what is the current situation?

Thank you,

Kinds regards,

Miguel Angel

entry.title: Finding B1 UI Field Labels for Database Fields Without Tedious Mapping
entry.content:
I need to map the SAP Business One database fields to their corresponding labels as they appear in the B1 client UI. For instance, in the Sales Quotation form, the field OQUT.CardCode is labeled as Customer in the UI.

I know I can use View > System Information to see this information, but with the number of fields across various tables, this approach feels a bit... overwhelming.

Is there a reference, document, or method to retrieve all these mappings in a more efficient way?

entry.title: A/p Down Payment Invoice & A/p Invoice Query
entry.content:
Hi

  I need query to get A/p Down Payment Invoice linked with A/p Invoice.

Thanks

entry.title: No matching records found 'Payment Terms' (OCTG) (ODBC -2028) [Message 131-183]
entry.content:
When print preview outgoing payment by account this error appear in sap b1

No matching records found 'Payment Terms' (OCTG) (ODBC -2028) [Message 131-183]
